name: John Hickenlooper 2020
subject: (1) McConnell attacks; and (2) Our upcoming budget meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, Our FEC deadline is days away, but we're looking ahead to two really important things we expect to happen in early January:
1. Considering our current lead in the polls, we anticipate McConnell's attack machine will launch a new round of attack ads with the intent of tearing down our campaign;

2. Our leadership team will meet to evaluate our finances and make some important decisions about what we can do -- and what we cannot do -- in the next few weeks to win this election.

**_On top of all that, we have to report our fundraising numbers publicly to the FEC soon -- and we need to file a strong report!_** The strength of this campaign is built on a whole lot of folks giving what they can to support John and our team. We don't take money from corporate PACs, and, unlike our opponent, we don't have a right-wing billionaire network waiting in the wings to buy this election (nor would we want one!). That's why we need to ask: [**Can you add your donation of $10 or more to John Hickenlooper 's grassroots campaign for Senate? Colorado is our best chance to flip one of the four seats we need to take back the Senate, which is why we're counting on your support today.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-2things?refcode=em-191228-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-2things?refcode=em-191228-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Thanks for adding your donation today. It means a lot to John and our team. -- Team Hick | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191228-2things?refcode=em-191228-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637715bf/691c9bd/6f424cc7/11a739ca/2470097363/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: HUGE NEWS [via 314 Action Fund]
subject: 🕰️The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| We have less than 24 hours to unlock the match and have all of our donations DOUBLED.

**What this means:** If we raise **$4,438** in the next 24 hours, all donations will be MATCHED dollar-for-dollar until midnight on December 31st.

**What could happen:** We can send double the resources to take on Mitch McConnell in Kentucky and double the resources to help Mark Kelly win in Arizona. [Chip in $10 to help us unlock the match](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+ask+to+help+us+unlock+the+match&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4")
* * *
Listen, we can't afford to come up short when we file our report with the Federal Election Commission (FEC).

We have to make our numbers PUBLIC, and anti-science Republicans will be scouring our numbers looking for any signs of weakness.

**We are days away from 2020, and Republicans are raising money hand over fist and funneling that money into science-denying candidates across the United States.**

We rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and right now, we need to lean on you for help.

[We already have our group of generous 314 supporters waiting in the wings to DOUBLE donations if we raise $4,438 in the next 24 hours.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+We+already+have+our+group+of+generous+31&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4")

314 Action

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb432c/4bd7760e/46597b5a/77ad26e9/3891824335/VEsHBA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191228_2_4")** to make a donation.

body:

| | |

name: Tina Smith
subject: I'll be frank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm running a campaign powered by folks like you pitching in whatever you can afford to keep us going strong. Join me today.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-question?refcode=em191228-question&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

**I'll be brief. I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Your support has never been more important -- especially as we close in on our final FEC deadline of the year.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-question?refcode=em191228-question&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191228-question?refcode=em191228-question&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")

---
Unlike a lot of other politicians, I didn't run for fame or power, and I certainly don't rely on special interest groups or wealthy mega-donors who call the shots in Washington.

Instead, I'm running a campaign powered by folks like you pitching in whatever you can afford to keep us going strong because I never want there to be a question about who I answer to. It's always _you_.

The truth is, though, it looks like we may fall short of our online fundraising goal for the year and the deadline is just a few days away. I'll be frank, it's been a tough month for fundraising, but I'm counting on you to help us catch up before we ring in the new year.

**Will you pitch in today to help our campaign reach this end-of-year goal before it's too late? Anything you can give will make a meaningful difference in our work to keep Minnesota blue.**

| [Hey - can you spare $5 for Senator Michael Bennet?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ba/134673f2/884f23f/6997941c/1105926241/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") We're sorry to be so direct, but we're racing the clock to raise enough money to keep our new TV ad on air:

* If we fall short, we won't be able to keep our TV ad on air in New Hampshire.

* If we don't run our ad, we won't reach the 67% of undecided voters.

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Fighting for our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Thanks for fighting with me

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC) Yang Gang --

When our team decided to set a goal of raising $3 million by midnight on December 31st, I have to admit I was skeptical.

It’s a massive goal. But on the other hand, this campaign is entering a new phase, so I do believe it’s possible.

**[If you believe too, chip in now. If not, read on. I hope I’ll convince you.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=5&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)**

I know you get emails all the time from Zach and Carly about how we intend to use the cash we raise. So I want to talk to you about the vision I have for this country -- and how hitting our individual goals all point us in the direction of making that vision possible.

I’m running for president because I can see the problems coming around the bend. Automation, self-driving cars and trucks, and tech companies eliminating millions of our retail jobs while paying zero in taxes.

I’m running because I can see that our leaders aren’t equipped to or interested in solving them. They’re not bad people, they just haven’t seen what I’ve seen. They come from different environments and backgrounds. And Washington, D.C. has failed us one too many times for us to keep relying on a status quo politician.

I’ve dedicated the last 10 years to fighting for the future of this country, by creating jobs in struggling towns and cities, and bringing these issues to light for all Americans to see.

Each time you make a contribution to this campaign, you’re joining that fight with me. And I can’t begin to tell you how much I appreciate everything you do for us.

We’ve relied on you since the beginning of this campaign, and you’ve gone above and beyond time and again. Now we’re in a bind and have just three days to close a major gap to hit our big goal ahead of the FEC deadline.

**[Can you step up and rush a contribution of $10 or more right now to make sure we don’t miss this goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=6&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=12&amount=25&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---
Thanks for fighting for the future of our country,

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20654?t=13&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5285%2E377263%2EtPLJtC) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Need your support before the end of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[We're gearing up for Democratic victory in 2020, but first we need to meet our final fundraising goal of 2019. Will you contribute $5 now to support my campaign?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Peter,
In 2020, the fight to elect a new president and a Democratic Senate majority are essential to the future of this country. I'm working hard to make it happen by keeping Illinois blue, but I need your support to finish the last quarter of 2019 strong so we have the resources we need to win.
**This is our last fundraising goal of 2019 -- can you help keep this campaign on track?**
**[Pitch in $5 now to show your support before the December 31 FEC deadline.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We know how critical the results of the 2020 elections will be to families in Illinois and across the country. That's why we need to do everything we can -- now and every day until next November -- to ensure we're in the best possible position to win these pivotal fights for the future.
Peter, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important. There is so much on the line in 2020 and I need supporters like you standing with me each step of the way. Can you step up to help me meet my end-of-quarter fundraising goal before the December 31 FEC deadline?
**[Before 2019 comes to a close, contribute $5 to help me meet this crucial goal.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191228i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4f47/42ab3cf4/600e50c2/135d5522/2362563348/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4f47/42ab3cf4/600e50c2/135d5523/2362563348/VEsA/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Important election update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Time is of the essence | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bf32de1ee5d/important-election-update?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | **The race for the Republican nomination is going into the home stretch!**
**Over the next two and a half months, voters will evaluate almost a dozen and a half candidates in order to answer two questions...**

1\. Which of these candidates best reflects my values and views?
2\. Which of these candidates has the best chance to win in November?

**I spent 2019 laying out exactly what I believe in and what voters can expect if I am the nominee...**

1\. Support President Trump and his agenda to grow our economy
2\. Build the wall and fight illegal immigration
3\. Defend and promote life from the moment of conception

[I know you want the same things. Chip in $25, $50, or even just $5 TODAY to represent your views in DC.](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=e1b6452be0&e=01c99b7fbd)

**_The assaults the do-nothing Democrats continue to wage on our
country must be stopped. With your generous support we WILL defeat these liberals and we WILL save America. _**

Because WE CAN WIN! I have worked hard to earn the confidence of our state party and elected leaders, as well as our local Republican groups.

More importantly, I have been pounding the pavement attending events all over the district to win votes.

I have already been up with radio, TV, and internet ads - giving me an advantage by reaching voters about our shared values.

**Of the 17 candidates running for the Republican nomination, I am best positioned to win the nomination and the general election.**
[That is why I am asking you to donate before the end of the year.](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=11d7926d82&e=01c99b7fbd)
A donation shows that you're on the team and helps assure that I am the top and best choice for the nomination and general election.

clean_body: Time is of the essence | | | | | | | The race for the Republican nomination is going into the home stretch! Over the next two and a half months, voters will evaluate almost a dozen and a half candidates in order to answer two questions... 1\. Which of these candidates best reflects my values and views? 2\. Which of these candidates has the best chance to win in November? I spent 2019 laying out exactly what I believe in and what voters can expect if I am the nominee... 1\. Support President Trump and his agenda to grow our economy 2\. Build the wall and fight illegal immigration 3\. Defend and promote life from the moment of conception The assaults the do-nothing Democrats continue to wage on our country must be stopped. With your generous support we WILL defeat these liberals and we WILL save America. Because WE CAN WIN! I have worked hard to earn the confidence of our state party and elected leaders, as well as our local Republican groups. More importantly, I have been pounding the pavement attending events all over the district to win votes. I have already been up with radio, TV, and internet ads - giving me an advantage by reaching voters about our shared values. Of the 17 candidates running for the Republican nomination, I am best positioned to win the nomination and the general election. A donation shows that you're on the team and helps assure that I am the top and best choice for the nomination and general election. We march together towards victory! body:
| Hi, Did you see the Vice President's email? Trump knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win back the White House in 2020 and he'll do everything in his power to stop us. Hi,
Did you see the Vice President's email?
Trump knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win back the White House in 2020 and he'll do everything in his power to stop us.
**The pressure is on and we 're still trailing our end-of-year budget targets by $6,311. [Please, make a contribution that works for you to help us hold the line and keep Minnesota blue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mkfmgXZHYya1Wkje_jCdHVO3T8qRHqgumNJuyN7u7m0=/rwPGQbovsUYNwKQRNRbictil3u7HkzmytCgzP3asbrQ=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

Thank you,
Berrett Gall
Finance Director
Tim Walz for Governor
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Walter Mondale
My friend,
We're living in a deeply troubling moment in history.
The President of the United States is spreading division, fear, and chaos from the highest levels of our government, and the Republican Party is enabling him every step of the way.
It's times like these that I'm most thankful to have a governor like Tim Walz, who we can always trust to lead with courage and put Minnesotans first.
The Trump campaign knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win the White House next year. They're planning to spend tens of millions of dollars to stop that from happening, jeopardizing every race up and down the ballot in the process.
Governor Walz is working hard to hold the line, and we all need to make sure he has the resources to keep fighting. That's why, ahead of his critical end-of-year deadline on Tuesday, I wanted to ask for your help:
[**Will you contribute $5 or more right away to help Governor Walz finish 2019 strong and keep Minnesota blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mkfmgXZHYya1Wkje_jCdHVO3T8qRHqgumNJuyN7u7m0=/rwPGQbovsUYNwKQRNRbictil3u7HkzmytCgzP3asbrQ=?refcode=body&amount=25)

********[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/mkfmgXZHYya1Wkje_jCdHVO3T8qRHqgumNJuyN7u7m0=/rwPGQbovsUYNwKQRNRbictil3u7HkzmytCgzP3asbrQ=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-2018)********

Tim's 2019 fundraising totals will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year. This is our first chance in 2020 to prove that Minnesotans have his back more than ever.
**There 's no battleground more critical than Minnesota and we can't afford to miss this opportunity. [Please make a contribution that works for you today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mkfmgXZHYya1Wkje_jCdHVO3T8qRHqgumNJuyN7u7m0=/rwPGQbovsUYNwKQRNRbictil3u7HkzmytCgzP3asbrQ=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

clean_body: | Hi, Did you see the Vice President's email? Trump knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win back the White House in 2020 and he'll do everything in his power to stop us. Hi, Did you see the Vice President's email? Trump knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win back the White House in 2020 and he'll do everything in his power to stop us. The pressure is on and we 're still trailing our end-of-year budget targets by $6,311. Thank you, Berrett Gall Finance Director Tim Walz for Governor \-------- Forwarded message -------- From: Walter Mondale My friend, We're living in a deeply troubling moment in history. The President of the United States is spreading division, fear, and chaos from the highest levels of our government, and the Republican Party is enabling him every step of the way. It's times like these that I'm most thankful to have a governor like Tim Walz, who we can always trust to lead with courage and put Minnesotans first. The Trump campaign knows that Democrats must win Minnesota to win the White House next year. They're planning to spend tens of millions of dollars to stop that from happening, jeopardizing every race up and down the ballot in the process. Governor Walz is working hard to hold the line, and we all need to make sure he has the resources to keep fighting. That's why, ahead of his critical end-of-year deadline on Tuesday, I wanted to ask for your help: If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********** ******** ******** ******** ******** Tim's 2019 fundraising totals will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year. This is our first chance in 2020 to prove that Minnesotans have his back more than ever. There 's no battleground more critical than Minnesota and we can't afford to miss this opportunity. Thank you, Walter Mondale | ******** | | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

name: Mark Warner for Senate 2020
subject: 🍾 Mark Warner’s 2020 Resolution: turn the Senate blue 🍾
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek,

True story: The other day, Team Warner was discussing our plans for New Year's Eve and revealing our 2020 resolutions. Someone decided to ask Mark what _his_ New Year's resolution was and do you know what he said? | **Mark Warner 's 2020 Resolution:**
**Turning the Senate blue.**

Will you join in on Mark's resolution? **[Pledge to Flip the Senate in 2020](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ed/53d9897e/53b4299c/1c89cbf7/1437825566/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-newyearsresolution")**
---
For the next year, Mark plans on doing everything he possibly can to make sure that when the ball drops on December 31, 2020, we'll be ringing in the new year...and a new Democratic majority in the Senate.

Here's the stark truth though: **The path to a new Democratic majority in the Senate runs _straight_ through Virginia.**

If Mark Warner is going to keep his 2020 resolution to flip the Senate, we have to defend his seat against the five Republicans currently challenging him.

**[Will you pledge to help Mark defend his seat in 2020 and meet this New Year's resolution?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ed/53d9897e/53b4299c/1c89cbf7/1437825566/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-newyearsresolution")**

Thank you for everything,
Team Warner

P.S. **Happy New Year!** Election Day 2020 will be here before we know it. **[Chip in?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ed/53d9897e/53b4299c/1c89cbf6/1437825566/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191229_p_1_fl__410__&refcode2=ask1&amount=10")**

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ed/53d9897e/53b4299c/1c89cbf5/1437825566/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191229_p_1_fl__410__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We are writing to ask if you would make a $3 contribution to our campaign TODAY. Our FEC fundraising deadline is coming up and Sara Gideon REALLY needs your help to beat Susan Collins. Link inside. - Amy
body:
We are getting very close
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92cd/840985664/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, if you have been waiting for the perfect time to make your first online contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins, I am here to tell you that today is that time.
Here's why:
We are getting very close to our FINAL FEC fundraising deadline of the year coming to a close.
Shortly after that happens, we are going to report not just how much money we've raised, but how many donations make up that total.
And that donation number is critical. Because while Susan Collins has the support of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and Washington Republicans, we have something she doesn't have: a lot of grassroots support.
So with the clock ticking toward this deadline, we are trying to not just raise as much money as we can, but we are also trying to get as many contributions as we can, as well. And that means we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our FINAL FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign comes to a close? This one is so important.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92cc/840985664/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyOS0xLWMifQ%3D%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em19129-1-c")
Susan Collins has Donald Trump raising money for her. She has Mitch McConnell, Lindsey Graham, and some of Brett Kavanaugh's biggest backers raising money for her.
But Sara Gideon has you, and if you chip in today, we are going to win this race.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92cc/840985664/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyOS0xLWMifQ%3D%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em19129-1-c")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92c3/840985664/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92c2/840985664/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e14/4bef7a87/6a0a71ae/287f92c1/840985664/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: 2020 is upon us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HERN FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Peter Willis , We may be a few days away from the dawn of a New Year, but the 2020 election cycle has already begun. We see it every day when we open our computers or turn on the TV. The Democrats are waging an all-out assault against President Trump and his supporters in Congress. They have sunk to new lows in their efforts to avoid actually legislating. Instead, they're focusing their ire on their sham impeachment efforts. **Why are they fighting so hard to destroy President Trump? Simple:_They know they can 't beat him in 2020. _** I'm ready to stand with President Trump in the coming year to ensure that come November 2020, we're celebrating keeping the White House and retaking the House of Representatives. But, I need your help _right now_ to build momentum. **We 're just days away from the New Year, and we need to send a clear message before our final, end-of-year fundraising deadline, that our support is broad, and growing. [Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or even just $5 or more to help us send that message?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/0rfj763MGjTUt7s3BjfVlOeQ/9bk5Pg2ajScG5EHGZufICA) ** Every dollar goes a long way to preparing ourselves for the fights to come in 2020. I'm ready to go to work. Are you? Let's close strong! -Kevin [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/0rfj763MGjTUt7s3BjfVlOeQ/9bk5Pg2ajScG5EHGZufICA)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t urgent . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Sorry to be emailing during the holidays -- I'll get right to the point: we're just a couple days away from our last FEC fundraising deadline of the year, and we're still short of our goal.

If you can give anything to help make up the last ground, please do: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-dec19-eoq**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dt1eYf1A1amuw-ThlM9MKjJEErqdFFBjUG82sGiTBSQ=/D7T07XoSUO-fgRHxQZWMIo7d9aZjRSZJ2WAiocdXJCY=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191229_1_1&amount=25&recurring=1)

Republicans are spending more than ever to try to unseat Democrats next year. We need to show them that we're not letting up and that we have what it takes to keep our majority in the House.

Thanks,

Mike [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dt1eYf1A1amuw-ThlM9MKjJEErqdFFBjUG82sGiTBSQ=/4AHlJguXeBU0b5REmnXCeSWseH_689j7ipvbOaxZpik=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191229_1_1&amount=25&recurring=1)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Dt1eYf1A1amuw-ThlM9MKjJEErqdFFBjUG82sGiTBSQ=/UHcD4sH9ujeActqnnQEaTlR18PjHN4awaeZUEzCMR3M=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191018_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

Friend,

The Democrats did not think through this impeachment charade. There's never been any evidence of wrongdoing by President Trump, but they pursued this political Witch Hunt anyway.

THREE YEARS of this scam cost our Nation irreplaceable time and money, and for what - so the Left could appease their Mega Hollywood Donors?

Well I hope they enjoyed their run because it's time to say goodbye and good riddance to their House Majority - the American People will never trust the Do Nothing Democrats again.

The attacks are only going to get more vicious heading into 2020 and that's why today is so important.

_Our FEC End-of-Year Deadline is coming up, and President Trump has set a massive goal. He wants to raise another**5 MILLION DOLLARS** to finish the year strong._

This is our most important deadline so far. Our fundraising numbers for all of 2019 will be published, and we need to DESTROY the 2020 Democrats. **This goal is so critical that the President has activated a SHORT-TERM QUADRUPLE-MATCH on ALL CONTRIBUTIONS.**

subject: what POLITICO has to say about TX-21

body:
Everyone will be watching to see if we post strong fundraising numbers.
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk12-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
---
Friend,

POLITICO is calling our race in TX-21 one of the biggest House battles of 2020. Wendy has a real chance to flip this red district blue and oust one of the most anti-choice members of Congress - he won by just over _two points_ last year!
But here's the thing: We're facing our biggest FEC deadline of the entire year.
Everyone will be watching to see if we post strong fundraising numbers at the start of 2020, and it will be crucial to enter the election year with resources that show we can win.
That's why we set a goal to raise another $25,000 before the year's up. But with just a couple days left, we're only 14% of the way there. **If we don't hit this goal, we'll fall way short of what it takes to win.**
**[Please, rush $3 or more - every dollar you can right now - to flip this Texas seat from red to blue, elect Wendy Davis and expand our Democratic House majority!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk12-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

clean_body: Everyone will be watching to see if we post strong fundraising numbers. | | | "" Friend, POLITICO is calling our race in TX-21 one of the biggest House battles of 2020. Wendy has a real chance to flip this red district blue and oust one of the most anti-choice members of Congress - he won by just over two points last year! But here's the thing: We're facing our biggest FEC deadline of the entire year. Everyone will be watching to see if we post strong fundraising numbers at the start of 2020, and it will be crucial to enter the election year with resources that show we can win. That's why we set a goal to raise another $25,000 before the year's up. But with just a couple days left, we're only 14% of the way there. If we don't hit this goal, we'll fall way short of what it takes to win. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "". Begin forwarded message:
> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRsQMqLhFnNr8JzRCfrMhv8cNlAL6FOB9jf5OIbHMQ4=/h0N5LRHMsCzhaBu8ml5JPj4KyBw7kDNPc1o3_ltRgwo=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191229email)
> Hi there,
> My team wanted me to send you a quick email asking for end-of-quarter contributions...so, to be clear, this is a fundraising email ([and if you want to skip right to chipping in, click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRsQMqLhFnNr8JzRCfrMhv8cNlAL6FOB9jf5OIbHMQ4=/h0N5LRHMsCzhaBu8ml5JPj4KyBw7kDNPc1o3_ltRgwo=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191229email)), but I really want to talk to you about all the incredible momentum our movement has had just these last few months.**We 've been traveling across the district, speaking with voters, and catching national attention too! Here are our highlights:**
> * We hosted 15 house parties across the district
> * We opened our new campaign office
> * We garnered an incredible list of endorsements from...
> * End Citizens United
> * Blue Dog Coalition
> * Council for a Livable World
> * 30+ Members of Congress
> * 4 State Reps
> * 2 County Elected Officials
> * 1 Local Mayor
> * 3 Local Council Members
> * 15 Local Candidates and Electeds
> * 8 Ambassadors
> * We helped local candidates for city council in the November elections -- local elections matter and I thank you for voting!
> * We saw the Trump administration undermine and attack Foreign Service Officers as well as uniformed military -- proving how desperately we need more true public servants, especially Foreign Service Officers, in Washington.
> * We witnesses Republicans getting so afraid of us winning this seat that they recruited a member of the Bush family to run against me, _even though he lives in a different district_.
>

> And now, it's all about to come to a close -- the month, the year, and the decade! Most importantly though, it's the end of the quarter, which means that our fundraising reports are going public at midnight on December 31st. **That means all eyes will be on our report to see how strong this campaign is and how much people care about the things we are fighting for: healthcare, education, the environment, and reducing gun violence.**
> [**So, I 'm personally asking, friend, will you chip in now to help us reach our fundraising goal this quarter?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRsQMqLhFnNr8JzRCfrMhv8cNlAL6FOB9jf5OIbHMQ4=/h0N5LRHMsCzhaBu8ml5JPj4KyBw7kDNPc1o3_ltRgwo=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191229email)
> | **[DONATE NOW ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRsQMqLhFnNr8JzRCfrMhv8cNlAL6FOB9jf5OIbHMQ4=/h0N5LRHMsCzhaBu8ml5JPj4KyBw7kDNPc1o3_ltRgwo=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191229email)**
> ---
> **Right now, the stakes of this race could not be higher and I thank you for standing with me.** Your support empowers me, and the whole campaign team, to work around the clock fighting back and organizing for Texas.
> **But that means, if we 're going to keep this momentum up in the new year, I need your help. As the race for TX-22 continues to ramp up, it's more important than ever that we hit our fundraising goal this quarter before our reports go public _in just 3 days!_**
> [**So please, chip in to help us reach this critical fundraising goal NOW before time runs out! ⇨**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRsQMqLhFnNr8JzRCfrMhv8cNlAL6FOB9jf5OIbHMQ4=/h0N5LRHMsCzhaBu8ml5JPj4KyBw7kDNPc1o3_ltRgwo=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20191229email)

subject: re: our public fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We know this is a big goal, but our movement has helped hit all our goals until this point. We believe that with your help, we can reach this goal, too. We wouldn't be asking if this weren't... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be64/45c30650/115cb77c8/66fd5a9a/3311322716/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
After Tuesday's FEC deadline, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become available to the public.

Reporters, pundits, and the Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of this campaign.

**This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible.**

Elizabeth Warren needs your help. Right now. The goal is $20 million for the quarter -- that's how much the campaign needs to keep our plans on track.

We know this is a big goal, but our movement has helped hit all our goals until this point. We believe that with your help, we can reach this goal, too.

**[We wouldn't be asking if this weren't important. Chip in for the first time today to help hit our $20 million goal before the FEC deadline, and we 'll send you a free sticker as a thank you:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be64/45c30650/115cb77c8/66fd5a9d/3311322716/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFZRl9FT1FfR09MX1RfMjAxOTEyMjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1YF_EOQ_GOL_T_20191229_V1S3_P")** [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852be64/45c30650/115cb77c8/66fd5a9d/3311322716/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFZRl9FT1FfR09MX1RfMjAxOTEyMjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1YF_EOQ_GOL_T_20191229_V1S3_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

We wouldn't be asking if this weren't... | | | "" After Tuesday's FEC deadline, our quarterly fundraising numbers will become available to the public. Reporters, pundits, and the Republican operatives will use these numbers to judge the strength of this campaign. This public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our movement's strength. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible. Elizabeth Warren needs your help. Right now. The goal is $20 million for the quarter -- that's how much the campaign needs to keep our plans on track. We know this is a big goal, but our movement has helped hit all our goals until this point. We believe that with your help, we can reach this goal, too. Friend, Good morning from HQ, where we are already hard at work reaching out to every supporter possible before 9 PM Oregon time on New Year's Eve. The fundraising numbers that will post in January send a message about our strength, or show that we're coming up short. We must do all we can to show our opponents that that we are here to win with a campaign that is built by supporters like you - not big corporate PACs. The 12/31 deadline is our most important yet - so I'll get right to the point: We are falling short of our fundraising goal and we need your support today. **[Friend, I have to ask because this is really important. Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to help ensure we reach our end-of-quarter goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/2wA/ni0YAA/t.2xy/5_owgdGxR56gzgbOrkaiVg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmna4X-2FuCyLdVpnCKKZCDb4rUpvO-2BeP7g31RKKUkWvewpo70t-2FB2kr-2BaKadiyx2ciH7iCTMOq2IMQMk-2BPk2eMXV1ez1tFKiXoquQNj3n-2FWGCEKO-2FRkwexIrkbkCcnpo0hKAA-3D-3D/eFck)**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: POLITICO: Nancy Pelosi's "the one person in Washington who can beat Trump at his own game"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Our president is a threat to our democracy, Peter. That's why the House impeached the president on charges of abuse of power and obstruction of Congress. While Trump has been desperately trying to undercut her authority, Speaker Pelosi held the caucus together and held Trump accountable. The GOP spent the impeachment debate yelling and screaming about anything but the truth to deliberately confuse the public because they have no defense for Trump's actions and they'll do anything to hold on to power. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against the White House and Republican obstruction and criminal behavior, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf0b/6e9863e8/1768f6bc/1db04a5a/1933676695/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/H5IOOTYW") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf0b/6e9863e8/1768f6bc/1db04a5a/1933676695/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/H5IOOTYW") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf0b/6e9863e8/1768f6bc/1db04a59/1933676695/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191229a.ND&refcode2=gU4s6aahZks4KVK9eSD4")

clean_body: | | | Our president is a threat to our democracy, Peter. That's why the House impeached the president on charges of abuse of power and obstruction of Congress. While Trump has been desperately trying to undercut her authority, Speaker Pelosi held the caucus together and held Trump accountable. The GOP spent the impeachment debate yelling and screaming about anything but the truth to deliberately confuse the public because they have no defense for Trump's actions and they'll do anything to hold on to power. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against the White House and Republican obstruction and criminal behavior, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: Do you support Nancy Pelosi? "" "" Thank you, The WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We cannot afford to lose Senator Markey's powerful leadership at this critical moment for our planet and its people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We cannot afford to lose Senator Markey's important leadership at this critical moment for our planet. | |
---
| Friends -

Nearly 100% of climate scientists agree that a life threatening emergency is upon us. We're facing potential catastrophe.

But these scientists have also underscored that we can do something about it. This is the last decade in human history when changing course with climate action can save unimaginable numbers of human lives and species.

We have the time, technology and the tools -- everything we need except the political will.

That's why this coming year is the critical year. What happens is going to be so important for our democracy and our planet.

We have to support the people who are the bravest and the boldest of our elected officials. Those leaders who will step up and take the action that is necessary.

At the very top of that list is Senator Ed Markey. He is a champion in our fight to address the climate crisis.

He is the co-author of the Green New Deal and has led the way on the need for climate action for decades. With his powerful leadership in the Senate, I know we can get this done, but first he needs our help to stay in the fight.

**[If you can, please make a $3 donation today to support his campaign. We need as many people as possible to step up before this month's FEC deadline, and your contribution will help us send a powerful message about our climate movement's strength.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfef/693b8b0a/43693fe6/72de706a/2424943606/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMS1jIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-1-c")**

I recently celebrated my 82nd birthday, and you know, I've lived a good life.

But I also know that I'm so fortunate to be healthy and living in a decade where we can actually make a difference. Together, we can save our planet and its people for generations to come.

I'm optimistic about that, and I know that Senator Ed Markey is too. We're more hopeful than ever thanks to the young people who are leading our movement in an intergenerational compact.

But there are others who have decided now, in the face of this climate catastrophe, that they want to challenge Senator Markey's progressive leadership.

I believe we cannot afford to lose Senator Markey's important leadership at this critical moment for our planet. He has an unparalleled record of legislative accomplishments to protect the environment, to fight the climate crisis, and to fuel the clean energy revolution. It's more important than ever to have partners we can trust with the experience and know how not just to fight but to boldly lead on this critical issue.

But like I said, I'm optimistic. I've worked with Senator Markey and seen firsthand that he knows how to win tough battles. I believe in him, and I believe that all of us working together can save this planet from the climate crisis.

**[If you believe too, then join me in supporting Senator Ed Markey by contributing $3 to his re-election campaign.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfef/693b8b0a/43693fe6/72de706a/2424943606/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMS1jIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-1-c")**

Our movement has a big year ahead of us. Lots of big fights, but this is at the top. Thank you for having Ed's back. I know it means a lot to him and to me.

In solidarity,

Jane Fonda **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfef/693b8b0a/43693fe6/72de706a/2424943606/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMS1jIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-1-c")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

subject: Michael emailed you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Good morning, team,

Michael emailed you yesterday about our fundraising goal (see below). This is one of the most important elections of our time, and Democrats can't afford to get this wrong.

That's why it's crucial we keep Michael's ad on TV to reach the 67% of undecided New Hampshire voters. Friend, it's going to be expensive, and we can't do it alone.

[So can you chip in $5 right now? Every dollar we raise will get us closer to reaching our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal to invest in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795a9/230298349/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795a9/230298349/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

_- --- FWD MESSAGE ----_

I'm so grateful for you, team.

Even when the DNC blocked us from the debates, or when some of the pundits doubted us, or when we announced our most aggressive fundraising goal yet, you've stood strong.

Yesterday, we launched our first TV ad in New Hampshire. Now my team says we need at least 10 people from 18326 to donate today to stay on track to hit our goal tomorrow and keep our ads on TV.

[So can I count on you to make your first donation?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795a9/230298349/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795ae/230298349/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795ad/230298349/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795ac/230298349/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election. I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than the next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ad.

[So can you chip in $5 to my campaign for president? Every dollar we raise will get us closer to reaching our crucial $700,000 fundraising goal to invest in New Hampshire:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8b6/134673f2/8877eb6/699795a9/230298349/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Shannon for Team Hickenlooper
subject: Meeting today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I'm heading into a meeting soon with Governor Hickenlooper to go over our fundraising numbers, and I could really use your help. With just three days before the most important FEC deadline we've ever faced, our projections show us falling a few thousand dollars short of our goal. **Every major political forecaster has rated our race a toss-up. Making Colorado the best chance Democrats have to flip a Senate seat and put us on a path to the majority.** But that makes us a top target for Trump, McConnell, and their network of right-wing secret money groups. Trump even pledged to come to Colorado "a lot" to campaign for our Republican opponent. **With our biggest deadline of the year coming up fast, any slip up now could jeopardize our plans for 2020 and give Republicans the advantage they 're hoping for.** [**John can 't win without your support. Will you pitch in anything you can now to help us meet our $500,000 goal so we can flip Colorado's Senate seat and stop the GOP's dangerous agenda?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-budget?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-budget?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Thanks for stepping up when it matters most. -- Shannon Shannon M. Salk
National Finance Director
Team Hick | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-budget?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: We've got some exciting news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
$212,035. We got this, team.
| | |
---
| Team -- We just got the latest finance report and we're blown away! Because of the support of this grassroots community we've raised $587,965 toward our end-of-year goal of $800,000. **That 's huge!** Take a minute to be proud of all the obstacles we've overcome on this underdog campaign, the countless voters and caucus-goers we've reached on ads, and the mighty teams we've built in the early states across the country. **It also means we 're launching more ads to expand our reach and communicate with more voters.** But, we can't get too excited just yet. We're in striking distance of $800,000 and it'd be a hard defeat if we missed it now. [_**Can you chip in $1, $5, $22, -- heck, $35 or whatever you can to help push us over the edge?**_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191229_BHQ_20191229-fr-BHQ-800update-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") It's been 10 days since our first TV ad went live on the air. People in every early state saw Cory speak directly to them in their living rooms, local eateries, and even on laptop screens. One problem: Running TV ads isn't cheap. When we say we're a grassroots campaign, when we talk about being the underdog in the race, we mean it. We don't take PAC money. We won't take a dime from special interests. We're 100% funded by supporters like you. **It 'd mean the world to Cory if he can count on our support to get us over the top of our $800,000 end-of-year goal. [_Please, don 't let Cory down when we're so close. Chip in whatever you can right now >>_](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191229_BHQ_20191229-fr-BHQ-800update-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** So glad to have you with us,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191229_BHQ_20191229-fr-BHQ-800update-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

---

If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec7/2392759894/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec6/2392759894/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec5/2392759894/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec4/2392759894/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec3/2392759894/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f74/5fca0d19/7bf117a1/291ccec7/2392759894/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
clean_body: $212,035. We got this, team. | | | | Team -- We just got the latest finance report and we're blown away! Because of the support of this grassroots community we've raised $587,965 toward our end-of-year goal of $800,000. That 's huge! Take a minute to be proud of all the obstacles we've overcome on this underdog campaign, the countless voters and caucus-goers we've reached on ads, and the mighty teams we've built in the early states across the country. It also means we 're launching more ads to expand our reach and communicate with more voters. But, we can't get too excited just yet. We're in striking distance of $800,000 and it'd be a hard defeat if we missed it now. "=" It's been 10 days since our first TV ad went live on the air. People in every early state saw Cory speak directly to them in their living rooms, local eateries, and even on laptop screens. One problem: Running TV ads isn't cheap. When we say we're a grassroots campaign, when we talk about being the underdog in the race, we mean it. We don't take PAC money. We won't take a dime from special interests. We're 100% funded by supporters like you. It 'd mean the world to Cory if he can count on our support to get us over the top of our $800,000 end-of-year goal. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Fox News just admitted:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:

| | I'm asking from the bottom of my heart: [**_I know we have a historic chance to unseat Mitch McConnell and take back the entire Senate. But we can 't do it without winning Ben Ray's race. I'm asking you to rush $10 before his critical deadline in 48 hours to elect Ben Ray, DEFEAT McConnell, and FLIP the Senate. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191229_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") I've been in the Senate for a decade. The damage I've watched Mitch McConnell inflict in that time is unspeakable. \- I've watched him cover up Trump's ties to Russia \- I've witnessed his shameful assault on Medicare \- I've watched his relentless attacks on women's rights **And now, I 'd love nothing more than to watch him lose his seat -- and his majority -- for what he's done.** I know this is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to defeat McConnell. Even _Fox News_ admits his favorability is historically low. But I also know Democrats can't win the Senate without winning Ben Ray's race. I need a progressive champion like him serving alongside me in the Senate. He needs 2,036 gifts before his critical end-of-year deadline. Can I count on your $10? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191229_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77c/18e32a7f/509891be/7b228cb8/3124030326/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77c/18e32a7f/509891be/7b228cb9/3124030326/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77c/18e32a7f/509891be/7b228cbe/3124030326/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc969/3eb3e2fc/69bf5aad/744ed65d/3458988495/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc969/3eb3e2fc/69bf5aad/744ed65c/3458988495/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc969/3eb3e2fc/69bf5aad/744ed65b/3458988495/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191229_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Trump Alert
subject: re: electoral college [your response needed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **BREAKING: **New polls suggest Trump could lose the popular vote by a wider margin than in 2016 but still win the Electoral College _- _and the presidency _ - again! _
---
**Team, we 're missing your response:
Should we abolish the Electoral College?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY3NzI0NTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTg5NzA0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY3NzI0NTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTg5NzA0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
This is catastrophic, Team: Trump's job approval ratings clearly show that a majority of Americans think his presidency is a disaster. But a recent New York Times analysis finds that Donald Trump _could_ _lose the popular vote by an unprecedented margin_ **- but still WIN the Electoral College and be reelected.**
Democratic governors are leading the charge to change the Electoral College as we know it. They want to ensure that everyone's vote is counted equally - and that the president is the person who gets the most votes from the American people, period.
**The Electoral College could have _massive_**** consequences in 2020, so we need to hear from 3,465 more Democrats before midnight tonight.** **Tell us by 11:59 p.m. for your response to be counted:**
| | **Should we abolish the Electoral College?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MTY3NzI0NTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTg5NzA0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY3NzI0NTQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTg5NzA0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | | | BREAKING: New polls suggest Trump could lose the popular vote by a wider margin than in 2016 but still win the Electoral College - and the presidency - again! Team, we 're missing your response: Should we abolish the Electoral College? | | | | This is catastrophic, Team: Trump's job approval ratings clearly show that a majority of Americans think his presidency is a disaster. But a recent New York Times analysis finds that Donald Trump could lose the popular vote by an unprecedented margin - but still WIN the Electoral College and be reelected. Democratic governors are leading the charge to change the Electoral College as we know it. They want to ensure that everyone's vote is counted equally - and that the president is the person who gets the most votes from the American people, period. The Electoral College could have massive consequences in 2020, so we need to hear from 3,465 more Democrats before midnight tonight. Tell us by 11:59 p.m. for your response to be counted: | | Should we abolish the Electoral College? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, . | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: We wouldn't be in this mess if it weren't for the electoral college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d470/3428117037/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | You know, when I'm frustrated by the actions of this president, I remind myself of one simple fact: He didn't win the popular vote in 2016. More people voted against him than voted for him. He simply doesn't represent the majority of Americans. **We wouldn't be in this mess if it weren't for the Electoral College.** The person who wins the most votes should win an election. Period. No president, Democratic or Republican, should EVER be sworn into office after the people vote for someone else. That's why I've introduced a constitutional amendment to abolish the Electoral College. Standing in the way? Mitch McConnell and an obstructionist Senate. _This is where you come in._[**Will you chip in $3 right now and help me build a movement to take back the Senate and abolish the Electoral College?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d471/3428117037/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") [****](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d471/3428117037/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") If we're ever going to abolish the Electoral College, or do anything else that puts the needs of the American people ahead of the power and profits of the wealthiest and giant corporations, we must take back the Senate and be ready with a strong, people-first vision. Are you ready to return power to the people by abolishing the Electoral College once and for all? Together, we can get this done. [**Join the fight by donating to my campaign today.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d471/3428117037/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d46e/3428117037/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d46f/3428117037/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d46c/3428117037/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c512/6cd27893/5292e8fe/1587d46d/3428117037/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-29-abolishec&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Josie DePasquale
subject: My son, Eugene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I can’t tell you how proud I am of the person Eugene has become. He is kind, generous, and an amazing example to his children. Seeing him as a father to Ben and Sarah fills my heart with joy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13373883/138787697/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.29_b1_jd_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmJlMDBlZC04ZjJhLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgOLm4aeUN2nF_qyM-mjR-EkkKm5oHm7aLwpDLAyhrw=) Team,

The last time I wrote to you, my son, Eugene, was facing his first FEC fundraising deadline. I was happy to play a small role in helping him meet that crucial goal. Sometimes, I still can’t believe my son is running for Congress, but I want him to know that I always have his back.

I can’t tell you how proud I am of the person Eugene has become. He is kind, generous, and an amazing example to his children. Seeing him as a father to Ben and Sarah fills my heart with joy.

But he is also a fighter, and as Pennsylvania's Auditor General, I have seen him continuously fight for the people of our communities. **I know that he will make us proud in Congress.**

[**I’m not a politician, and I don’t like asking you to part ways with your hard-earned money, but this campaign is extremely competitive and too important to sit on the sidelines. Would you consider donating to Eugene’s campaign, so he can start off the New Year on the right foot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13373884/138787699/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.29_b1_jd_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmJlMDBlZC04ZjJhLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgOLm4aeUN2nF_qyM-mjR-EkkKm5oHm7aLwpDLAyhrw=)

I believe in Eugene and I know that if everyone gets involved, even in a small way, he can win this. Thank you for supporting my son, and Happy New Year!

\--_Josie DePasquale_
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: I Need Your Help! Hours Remain to Reach 2019 Fundraising Goal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

I hope you and your family had a joyous Christmas.

As you know, the end of 2019 is upon us and so is a [**critical campaign fundraising deadline**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=dadc2b029b&e=9f843ba602).

We are close to our 2019 fundraising goal and need your help to put us over the top! Help send a battle-tested patriot to D.C. so that we can [**fight radically-regressive socialists**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=30b541a8fa&e=9f843ba602)[ and ](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=65135bea07&e=9f843ba602)[**defend President Trump**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=d8084060f6&e=9f843ba602)**!**

THIS IS OUR [**LAST CHANCE**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=af2e5e2c12&e=9f843ba602) TO TURN OUR GRASSROOTS ARMY INTO A FUNDRAISING ARMY!

We have had an incredible 2019 and have built a strong team from the ground up. Veterans, gun owners, farmers, and so many others have supported our message of fierce, conservative, battle-tested leadership. We don’t want to sit at the insider establishment table, we want to flip the table over.

With your help, we'll finish 2019 on the up and head into 2020 stronger than ever! Thank you and God Bless.

Faithfully Yours,
Rob

P.S. - Please consider [**donating**](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=e5c7c6946f&e=9f843ba602) any amount you're able to give.
