name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: How you can determine the 2020 election results
body:
Peter,
I’ve got to tell you, the intensity of the election campaigns underway is unprecedented.
Secular candidates and organizations are strategic and determined. They have networked resources together that can influence millions to the polls - with an amassed war chest estimated at a billion dollars to run slick TV and Internet advertising smearing those who stand for biblical values. Think about what you and I are up against...
A secular culture growing more hostile to Christianity with every passing day. A viciously biased news media, and the Silicon Valley powerhouses silencing us when we speak out.
Secular leftists are working overtime to produce election results that lead to more judges on federal courts who will advance abortion and force Christians to abandon their beliefs on marriage and gender. They want to see abortion funding increase and allow abortions AFTER birth. And every day a growing number actually endorses socialism - and want to see capitalism smothered which will kill the American spirit.
**If you and I are to compete against this unprecedented onslaught of anti-Christian, anti-American, anti-freedom forces, we must go above and beyond to reach Christians to vote.**
At My Faith Votes we have a four-part 2020 plan that can unleash the full power of 90-million Christians in America:
1. **Deploy cutting edge technology** to equip Christians with voter guides and election information. We also apply data analysis, research, and technology to strategically reach non-voters in key states and counties.
2. **Provide faith-based voting resources to the youngest generation** of voters on Christian university campuses across America to counter the anti-biblical ideologies that motivate most secular students to vote.
3. **Equip pastors and church leaders** with free professional resources, including videos, talking points, bulletin inserts, voter guides, party platform guides, and voter assistance technology with voter reminders to inform and empower people in the pews to vote from a biblical worldview.
4. **Launching a national media campaign** on TV, radio and social media to inspire millions of Christians across the country to bring the influence of their faith into the voting booth.

**It won’t be cheap to turn out 90-million Christians to vote. And before the end of the year we need to raise $223,000. I cannot express to you how critical it is to our 2020 plan that we meet this deadline.**
A generous donor has provided us with a matching grant. Right now, every dollar you give will be DOUBLED. I’m counting on your help.
[That’s why I’m asking you to partner with us](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191229apl01nd&n=1). **[Will you please invest your tax-deductible donation to help execute on the 2020 action plan to mobilize Christians](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191229apl01nd&n=2)?**
Please, pray about how you can invest in this work. And remember that the yield on your partnership will come not just now but for future generations as we fight to turn out a winning margin of voters in the coming election.
Thank you for your commitment to protect American and Christian values.
[Donate Today and Your Gift will be Doubled](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191229apl01nd&n=3)
---
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191229apl01nd&n=4)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191229apl01nd&n=5).

body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### FUNDRAISING DEADLINE!!!
I NEED YOUR HELP
---
| [Donate Now](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=0af8c2090c&e=a212bb87cc "Donate Now")
---
|
With just 48 hours left of this fundraising quarter please consider joining me in donating to the Troy Downing for Montana campaign.
I'm proud to support my friend Troy. I know that we need strong conservative leadership in Helena.
Troy is the Republican that can win in November.
DONATE NOW
---
| [JOIN RUSS. DONATE NOW](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=61963a365d&e=a212bb87cc "JOIN RUSS. DONATE NOW")
---
| Below is my letter in support of Troy Downing. Check it Now!
---
|
---
| | From the Desk of Judge Russ Fagg

In todays hyper-partisan political environment, it’s becoming rarer
and rarer for friendships to form in the midst of competition. But,
that’s exactly what happened between myself and Troy Downing. On the
US Senate campaign trail together, I got to know Troy as a committed
father and husband, a patriotic American, a strong conservative, and,
of course, a friend.

As you know, Troy Downing is running to be Montana’s next State
Auditor. Troy has my full support, endorsement, and I was honored to
donate to his campaign.

Please consider joining me in sending Troy Downing a generous
contribution of $1,440, $720; $360; $100; or even $50 dollars before
the new year.

My friend Troy is a business owner, entrepreneur, and combat vet.
After a successful career, Troy joined the Air Force following 9/11
and served two tours in Afghanistan. It’s this level of selflessness
and patriotism that we as conservatives need to support.

Now is the time to rally behind strong conservatives like Troy
Downing. Please consider sending Troy a check or going to
TroyDowning.com to donate.

As Montana’s next State Auditor, Troy will advocate for market-driven
solutions to the growing costs of health insurance and prescription
drug prices. As a member of the Land Board, Troy Downing will fight
for Republican solutions and fulfill the Constitutional mandate of
maximizing funding for our school system.

I ask that you prayerfully consider joining me in supporting Troy
Downing for State Auditor. As you know, I don’t make these requests
lightly, but I also know we need people committed to our country and
state to take the risk to run a statewide race, in order to improve
our Montana way of life.

Thank you,

Judge Russ Fagg
---

In this email, we're going to do something different -- something a little risky.

Traditionally, campaigns wait until after the mandatory FEC reporting deadlines to announce how much they've raised. But this isn't a traditional campaign. We're a grassroots team, and you should know exactly where things stand right now -- and exactly why it's important that you give.

So far this quarter, **we 've raised a little over $17 million**. That's a good chunk behind where we were at this time last quarter.

The good news? We have until midnight on December 31 to get things going.

**So Elizabeth Warren needs your help. Right now. The goal is $20 million for the quarter -- that's how much the campaign needs to keep our plans on track.**

**[Please chip in $2 or whatever you can to help close the fundraising gap and continue building our ground game at the most critical point before the primaries and caucuses start.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf84/45c30650/115a3ff44/66fd4048/2597895858/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFaRl9FT1FfS0lDX1FfMjAxOTEyMjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1ZF_EOQ_KIC_Q_20191229_V1S3_P")**

>
Now, we don't have to match what we raised last quarter -- and we probably won't.

But if the numbers don't pick up, we run the risk of having to pull back plans to organize for Elizabeth Warren in all 50 states during the primary. And that plan is central to her path to victory.

By setting this goal and revealing to our opponents where we are, we give up some strategic advantage.

That's how important it is to close this gap.

This campaign belongs to you, and you're in the driver's seat for what happens now.

The billionaires in wine caves are ready to clink glasses and celebrate because they're confident that having more money than you means they'll be able to drown out your voice in this process to choose the Democratic nominee.

Asking supporters like you to chip in is the only way we're going to try to catch up on fundraising. There are no wealthy donors in high-rise penthouses or outside super PACs coming to the rescue.

Just you, and thousands of other supporters like you, digging deep to pitch in what they can to do this.

Elizabeth is proud that we're running a 100% grassroots-funded campaign. She wouldn't have it any other way.

But if there were ever a time for every grassroots supporter to step up, it's now.

**[Please contribute $2 or whatever you can to help close this fundraising gap.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf84/45c30650/115a3ff44/66fd4048/2597895858/VEsDBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFaRl9FT1FfS0lDX1FfMjAxOTEyMjlfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1ZF_EOQ_KIC_Q_20191229_V1S3_P")**

name: Charles Booker
subject: smoke and mirrors
body:
|
---
Folks, I’m tired. I’m tired of Kentuckians being lied to. I’m tired of the smoke and mirrors that cons like Mitch McConnell put up come election time. **It has been his power and our poverty for too damn long.** I’ve been exploring a run for Senate because it’s about time Kentuckians come together for our fair share. I owe it to the people of Kentucky to only run if I see a true path to victory. **But we have just two days left to make sure we have the resources to officially take on Mitch in 2020.** We’re falling thousands short of our December goal right now. But we’ve got to make it. I’m tired of Mitch gaining power and wealth in Washington while we lose it in our Commonwealth. **_****_**[If you’re tired, too, chip in whatever you can to this movement so we have the resources to finally defeat Mitch McConnell.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13376870/138829848/-1631903886?refcode=cbec20191229-nd_a1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5NGJlMi1hNTJhLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMttFzg8LpAQ_QwUvXYo4HKqSG6yZyPbLhyOoyTTck4=)**_****_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **** | ******[Express Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13376871/138829849/-1631903886?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=cbec20191229-AB-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWY5NGJlMi1hNTJhLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMttFzg8LpAQ_QwUvXYo4HKqSG6yZyPbLhyOoyTTck4=)******

The common factor behind the greatest moments in American history? People coming together. That’s why I know we can do this, folks. We’re going to make history.
Let’s keep standing together,

name: Sasha
subject: another 21 responses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Gary's hoping to see input
Friend - As we approach the end of the year and head into 2020, Gary's hoping to see input from another 21 folks. Hearing what's most important to you shapes this campaign, and before I sit down with Gary tomorrow to go over responses, I'm hoping you'll be able to share your thoughts.
**[It's a quick survey- will you take just a minute to submit your feedback?](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priority-Dec-Survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk178-su-nd")**

Thank you,
Sasha Greer
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary Peters
Date: Thu, Dec 05, 2019
Subject: do you have a moment? (looking for your input)
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da906/5721a3ed/706219e1/efb43f0/3752885298/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend,

There's one thing that motivates me above anything else in the Senate - and that's getting things done for the people of Michigan. Often times, that means passing legislation to make a real difference in people's lives. Other times, it means demanding the truth and protecting our democratic institutions.
So when it comes to what's happening in Washington right now, I'm determined to fight for accountability, honesty and transparency. Americans deserve that from their government.
Trust me, I know everything that's going on right now can feel chaotic. That's why I think it's important to take a step back and check in with you. Especially with the year coming to an end - and as we enter a critical election year - I want to know what issues are most important to you.
**So I've put together this new survey to get your feedback. With the election right around the corner, I really want to hear what's on your mind. Can you take just a moment to submit your feedback? You can use this link:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priorities](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-Priority-Dec-Survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk178-su-nd")**
In the year ahead, it will be more important than ever to come together and fight for what's right. I appreciate you taking the time.

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da906/5721a3ed/706219e1/efb43cf/3752885298/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da906/5721a3ed/706219e1/efb43ce/3752885298/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da906/5721a3ed/706219e1/efb43cd/3752885298/VEsA/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da906/5721a3ed/706219e1/efb43cc/3752885298/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77f/18e32a7f/50e35a16/7b228f54/3047491972/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77f/18e32a7f/50e35a16/7b228f55/3047491972/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77f/18e32a7f/50e35a16/7b228f4a/3047491972/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

subject: this one matters a lot

body:
Hi there, I know you’ve been getting a lot of messages from us, but it’s because this public FEC fundraising deadline is so crucial. It’s our final test before the Election Year, and our numbers will go public. Our California Freshmen are depending on us. We’re still a little over $4,000 short - can you help us close the gap?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lvf-dec19?refcode=LVF_EM_FR_ACT_191229_2_3&amount=35&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lvf-dec19?refcode=LVF_EM_FR_ACT_191229_2_3&amount=35&recurring=auto]

Thanks,

Zoe

Sent from my iPad

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]
Contributions or gifts to Zoe Lofgren for Congress are not tax deductible.Paid for by Lofgren for Congress

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: We're short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
With two days to go, we're still a good bit short of where we need to be. | |
---
| Friends -

We said we'd reach out again with an update on our ambitious goal for this FEC deadline. So here it is:

With two days to go, we're still a good bit short of where we need to be. We're now at risk of missing this goal. That's not great.

We knew it would be tough to reach, but we believed this team could do it. The good news is there's still time to catch up to where we need to be to hit our goal.

However to get there, we're going to need a bunch of people like you to step up today to chip in whatever you can afford.

**[Can you make a donation-- of any amount -- right now to help us reach our goal before the FEC deadline? With so much at stake in 2020, we cannot afford to fall short now.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfed/693b8b0a/436b2cb1/72de7052/893938040/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-2-a")**

[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfed/693b8b0a/436b2cb1/72de7052/893938040/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-2-a")
If we build a movement of working people behind Ed, we can accomplish big things in this race and in the United States Senate. None of that will be possible if we fall short now.

That's why it's so important that we hit our goal and show everyone how powerful our grassroots team is.

Thank you for all you do,

Team Markey **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfed/693b8b0a/436b2cb1/72de7052/893938040/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMi1hIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191229-2-a")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfed/693b8b0a/436b2cb1/72de7051/893938040/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfed/693b8b0a/436b2cb1/72de7050/893938040/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Fighting for ALL Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cede/30a4f917/509b386b/28ce882d/850424024/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1")

| | When you're elected to Congress, your job is to fight for everyone you represent -- not just the most wealthy and well connected. That means fighting for single mothers living on minimum wage and struggling to put food on the table, fighting for parents who can't afford their child's medical treatment, and fighting for the elderly trying to afford their growing prescription costs. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - When you're elected to Congress, your job is to fight for **everyone** you represent -- not just the most wealthy and well connected. That means fighting for single mothers living on minimum wage and struggling to put food on the table, fighting for parents who can't afford their child's medical treatment, and fighting for the elderly trying to afford their growing prescription costs. **My opponent Republican Steve Chabot has only worried about the best interests of his wealthiest donors** \-- securing them tax breaks while families in his district continue to struggle. [**Will you make a MATCHED donation to bring an end to the callousness Chabot has brought to Washington? We 're still $7,027 short of our end of quarter goal and could use your help:**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+make+a+MATCHED+donation+to+brin&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 x2 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+x2+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1")

---
When my son Henry was born with a hole in his heart, we were thrust into uncertainty and heart-wrenching worry.
We were lucky enough to not have to worry about being sent into debt as well -- **but so many other families around us were facing the earth-shattering reality of dealing with a sick child AND crushing medical costs.**
Steve Chabot's votes against protections for people with pre-existing conditions are inexcusable -- and they have real and horrifying implications for the families he represents. **It 's just another example of how out of touch he's become.**
[**Chip in a MATCHED donation if you 're ready to send him into retirement in 2020 ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in+a+MATCHED+donation+if+yoursquore&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1")
| | [Donate (x2)](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_eoq419?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=10+-+Donate+x2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191229_EOQ7_U1_X1")
---
Thank you,
Nikki

"" | | "" Thank you, Nikki | | If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio Nikki Foster for Ohio PO Box 537 Mason, OH 45040 mailto:info@nikkifosteroh.com "" ""

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Pelosi and House Dems fight to restore Voting Rights Act protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the midst of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi showed the country what real leadership looks like: She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate. Republicans don't want more people to vote. They know that when people vote, the GOP loses. They'd rather keep as few people voting as possible so they can hold on to power and let their rich donors dictate policy instead of the people. At When Democrats, we're doing all we can to inform voters about the GOP's nefarious actions and get them to the polls to defeat the GOP. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House in 2020, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating, purging voter rolls, and discouraging voters. We need 10,000 engaged Democrats to demand the Senate pass the VRAA and ensure every eligible voter can vote in 2020 \-- if you believe we need to stand up to the GOP and protect the right to vote: [**Demand the Senate protect the right to vote! >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf0f/6e9863e8/176a38aa/1db04a5d/4048024289/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/wP7esSfi") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf0f/6e9863e8/176a38aa/1db04aa3/4048024289/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191229b.ND&refcode2=qF5I9MmdImUQG7GjZIsa")
---

Friend - POLITICO is calling our race one of the biggest House battles in the country, but right now, our opponent, Chip Roy, is massively outraising us with nearly TWICE as much cash in the bank.
Roy has one of the most anti-choice records in Congress, and GOP leaders and megadonors are lining his campaign coffers to keep him in the House - and continue their attacks on women's reproductive freedoms.
**But we 're up against our most important FEC deadline of the year and falling short of our goal to raise another $25,000.**
As we head into the election year - and with the future of our democracy at stake - missing this goal is simply not an option. All eyes will be on our race, and this FEC report, to see if we have what it takes to win. That's why Wendy is counting on this team.
**[**Will you rush a donation of $3 or more right now to help Wendy Davis flip this seat from red to blue, expand our Democratic majority in the House and hold Trump accountable?**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a8a/704929dc/160e5e01/39939362/2801900592/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk13-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: ⏰ Two. Days. Left.
body:
Only 48 hours remain to help send an everyday Iowan to get Congress working again.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tAqTxfGHMAw&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
Our Founders gave this nation a magnificent framework. And the right they decided to put first? Religious freedom. But our churches and believers everywhere are under attack. In Congress, I will protect religious conscience and the First Amendment.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489
Hello

I hope you and your family had a wonderful Christmas! I thought it most appropriate to take this time of year to reflect on our religious freedoms. Much like Christ was later persecuted for practicing our faith so were our nation's settlers fleeing from their homeland.

But the threat to our First Amendment rights today comes from within. The guarantee of religious freedom is no longer so certain as radical leftists seek to upend the lives of practicing Christians and anti-semites put our Jewish brethren in the crosshairs.

My support for the Constitution, and especially the First Amendment, is unwavering. In Congress, I will stand up to any unhinged Democrat instigating a war on religious belief and the way of life for so many Iowans in the Fourth District. Every day an American's religious conscience is violated and mocked without consequence. We must have an influential voice in Congress from northwest Iowa to end this religious persecution once and for all.

But I can't protect our religious freedoms without your support. Please consider donating $10, $25 or even $50 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489) to our campaign and help spread our message throughout your community.
DONATE $10 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489)
DONATE $25 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489)
DONATE $50 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come.

Your neighbor,
MORE ON RELIGIOUS FREEDOM
JOIN OUR CAUSE

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zEwutAwbJaA&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489

Only hours remain until the 2019 fundraising deadline. We're up against a whole lot, but with your help we can beat the odds and the career politicians to send a conservative outsider who will get Congress working again.

⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️ (https://emojipedia.org/downwards-black-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489)

DONATE TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=938cfb8412-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-938cfb8412-25822489)
BUILDING OUR NETWORK
Rang in the Christmas cheer with the Salvation Army this week - it's always nice to help out the less fortunate during this season of giving. Was also blessed to spend time with my family and friends celebrating the birth of our Savior.

clean_body: Only 48 hours remain to help send an everyday Iowan to get Congress working again. Our Founders gave this nation a magnificent framework. And the right they decided to put first? Religious freedom. But our churches and believers everywhere are under attack. In Congress, I will protect religious conscience and the First Amendment. Hello I hope you and your family had a wonderful Christmas! I thought it most appropriate to take this time of year to reflect on our religious freedoms. Much like Christ was later persecuted for practicing our faith so were our nation's settlers fleeing from their homeland. But the threat to our First Amendment rights today comes from within. The guarantee of religious freedom is no longer so certain as radical leftists seek to upend the lives of practicing Christians and anti-semites put our Jewish brethren in the crosshairs. My support for the Constitution, and especially the First Amendment, is unwavering. In Congress, I will stand up to any unhinged Democrat instigating a war on religious belief and the way of life for so many Iowans in the Fourth District. Every day an American's religious conscience is violated and mocked without consequence. We must have an influential voice in Congress from northwest Iowa to end this religious persecution once and for all. But I can't protect our religious freedoms without your support. Please consider donating $10, $25 or even $50 () to our campaign and help spread our message throughout your community. DONATE $10 TODAY () DONATE $25 TODAY () DONATE $50 TODAY () As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you. Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come. Your neighbor, MORE ON RELIGIOUS FREEDOM JOIN OUR CAUSE Only hours remain until the 2019 fundraising deadline. We're up against a whole lot, but with your help we can beat the odds and the career politicians to send a conservative outsider who will get Congress working again. ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️ () DONATE TODAY () BUILDING OUR NETWORK Rang in the Christmas cheer with the Salvation Army this week - it's always nice to help out the less fortunate during this season of giving. Was also blessed to spend time with my family and friends celebrating the birth of our Savior. name: MJ Hegar
subject: I want to take a moment to tell you exactly why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Our strategy has to be different.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890604/7f51f7bc/4a3f0c2b/4ef0391b/2479327219/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

My opponent, Senator John Cornyn, has no shortage of cash. In addition to his own nearly $11 million, a super PAC has raised nearly $10 million to keep Texas' Senate seat in his -- and Mitch McConnell's -- hands.

That's a _lot_ of money to compete with, so our strategy has to be different. I want to take a moment before the FEC filing deadline to tell you exactly why **[your support at this stage in the race](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890604/7f51f7bc/4a3f0c2b/4ef0391a/2479327219/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191229.2nd__695__&amount=10&recurring=true")** is so important. Here's what we're doing to win:
* We're planning digital and TV ads that spread this campaign's message far and wide
* We're hiring staff to build a dynamic campaign from the ground up
* I'm on the road every week to meet voters and hear their concerns

[**Help us fund this critical work!
Make a matched donation before 12/31 >> **](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890604/7f51f7bc/4a3f0c2b/4ef0391a/2479327219/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191229.2nd__695__&amount=10&recurring=true") I'm not taking any money from corporate PACs (because I answer to Texans, not the special interests), so every goal we set really matters. And this $75,000 end-of-year goal is our most important yet. It's the last quarterly FEC deadline before early voting starts in the primary.

**To help us hit our goal, every gift made before Tuesday 's midnight deadline will be MATCHED.

Will you pitch in to help us hit our end-of-year goal and keep this campaign in high gear?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: We are writing to ask if you could make a $3 contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. Here's why this request is so important.
body:
We are just a few days away
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1b/4bef7a87/6a0e0ca6/287f9275/3129634736/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**THE SITUATION:** We are just a few days away from the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year and our campaign is pacing behind the number of donations we need in order to reach our fundraising goals. Not great.
**OUR JOB:** With time running out, our only chance to close the gap on Susan Collins and the big money flooding in to support her from Washington D.C. Republicans is by generating as many individual donations as we possibly can before this deadline comes to a close.
**THE NUMBERS:** We've run some numbers and figured that if we can get 823 people to add their first online contribution before this deadline, we'd have a chance to hit our goals.
**THE ASK:**
[**Can make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign for Senate today? This FEC deadline is CRITICAL to our success, and only YOU can help us reach our goals.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1b/4bef7a87/6a0e0ca6/287f9274/3129634736/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191229-2-full")
**OUR THANKS:** We have received far more donations than Susan Collins in this race. And that's been critical, because it's our only chance at keeping pace and running the kind of campaign that will win.
So thank you. Your support means everything to our campaign.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1b/4bef7a87/6a0e0ca6/287f9274/3129634736/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191229-2-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1b/4bef7a87/6a0e0ca6/287f924b/3129634736/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e1b/4bef7a87/6a0e0ca6/287f9249/3129634736/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Did you know I was a geologist?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Look, I'll keep this one short -- I'm not your typical politician. I was a geologist up until 1988 when I got laid off during an economic downturn. It was then that I got my inspiration to open up a brewpub in downtown Denver. What you see is what you get with me. **As Mayor of Denver and later Governor of Colorado, I believed that the best change happened when we all worked together.** And that's exactly how I want to run this campaign for United States Senate -- with regular folks chipping in whatever they can to make a difference. That's why I'm refusing a single penny from corporate PACs. [**Will you step up today with a donation of $10 or more to help us reach our critical end-of-year goal and build a winning campaign to flip this Senate seat in Colorado?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-typical?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-typical?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") We're so close to reaching our $500,000 end-of-quarter goal, you just might be the person we need to put us over the top. Please, donate today if you can. Thanks for all you do. -- John | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191229-typical?refcode=em-191229-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

John has spent the last year traveling the country and talking to voters from all walks of life. And the thing he hears over and over again is that Democrats are scared right now.

**They 're scared we're going to lose the biggest election of our lifetimes because we chose to elevate a platform that is impossible to implement.**

Policy proposals like "Medicare for All" or the "Green New Deal" sound exciting, but in reality they'll wreak havoc on our economy and health care system. We only have one shot to get this right -- and we're doing everything we can to make sure we win.

That's why John has always been the voice of pragmatism in this race, to cut through the noise and partisan talking points.

But if we don't have a strong showing after this public fundraising deadline, if we don't have the resources, we won't be able to continue spreading our message.

Your donation today will make the difference in this fight.

**So please, chip in any amount right now:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.29_e2_td_eoy_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=1,5,35,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=8+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomDonate&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.12.29_e2_td_eoy_all&source=em_fr_2019.12.29_e2_td_eoy_all")**

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Our world class forests
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CANNING FOR CONGRESS ](https://u1584542
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.2xy/9N8wChtjReSbo5eoYpprcA/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718oCnSreTQxXNPCZWNM9FYyBVqFSgzQbwkT6U-2FyyWaOpUiLtmZpMMiR3E2m1X5X5U2eBQ8uiCbow5uFWQW3NYjxigEU6gPVCJb0DoNwMUhkbaFkCJVayi-2FNhvuqsmNAr3XOcvBrY9sUz3SLbSRbPGKqA-3D-3D/y612)
---
Hi Friend, Oregon's remaining old growth forests are among the most critical assets we have in the fight against climate change. Ancient forests remove carbon pollution from the air, and keeping them standing is vital to stabilizing our climate. Oregon can lead the way with our world class forests, creating forestry jobs that enhance the forests' natural abilities to cool the climate...jobs that will last for generations to come. That is why I am am in this fight and why I am not taking any money from the fossil fuel industry or big timber corporations, and why I need your help to win this campaign.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.2xy/9N8wChtjReSbo5eoYpprcA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLDm1Km4J7DIaO3v0nO4Ayf-2FFgJraK-2BlUdUh5v0sOx6kIdUIPwWlCKWtqiCOh40tWTMkdS-2BQoQCPsVoTNgsyvc7jwc0nL3JiSKmHMfUyCeWQ-2Ftb5TMojemwVrIFNZ9AXdD6uPOM-2BCare2TR4Q-2FhdbfKtRAc9OFIIOUA-2FT2-2FzRksAcFne-2F53ml-2B9mYrTqaBx-2FhTi3P7Yoe1YIbthec6-2FXPDLYXESyuih5XOjiILujVXA5oYtqjAO8T-2Fp7g46fR4cn3k-3D/D3r7)

[ **Watch the Video and Chip in Now** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.2xy/9N8wChtjReSbo5eoYpprcA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLDm1Km4J7DIaO3v0nO4AyfJxtT6ZvKu3K4PnOngiyar9JgmMa-2FCDzaf0-2FnkyzcEyLiMkr06AHyGChoKtMbhjKdEDElOR-2FhMVs5SQCbYGSDYV-2FtigxrYKuQerqyk7Mun9LlXcWV6-2FNL3aiGE9y73vHIOC3VJ4surMxzsGscXy2IQwqXY1v5n0e-2BEWOj8diXJKUBys39ub1pf6xQtewTrwDnRs99bXPK8uvMvFVlTiY0H2w9MuxMejpVXGmNWgi88xM-3D/6yNm)
---
We are just two days away from the fundraising deadline for 2019. However much we raise, or fall short, will be seen as a sign of our strength going into 2020. And while we are asking everyday people like you to pitch in what you can, the industrial timber corporations are busy holding closed door meetings with politicians to push their agenda, at our expense. We need every supporter to send a contribution before 9 PM Oregon time on New Years Eve, so we can send a strong message that we're playing to win in 2020. $10, $25, $100 or whatever you can afford - it all matters in this grassroots campaign. Thank you! Together, we can win! Doyle Canning
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! [You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.2xy/9N8wChtjReSbo5eoYpprcA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2FwvdXh4D9A9ffiDChmxtXvoHD0aTsblSl6UtECdEJcf-2FtAc4yRvc-2BCQDopt88MQu9Glja9IbDnNcbRBB-2BTAep0xLUyFRM-2F2bVmY5MP9vnQjs4UAoEPzvLQmQCmIdlX8UUESadGkISdNBJ42daHmuvOMW2ErfZd74NPCJLWF9VVVd-2BuKEGL88bhYHhDzRwp09XQUhIhZ-2BgR41WiB-2Fv2omOemWjHJAqTtHmXJARhve-2F91u-2Fk-3D/2IVi "Donate to Doyle Canning")

clean_body: | | Hi Friend, Oregon's remaining old growth forests are among the most critical assets we have in the fight against climate change. Ancient forests remove carbon pollution from the air, and keeping them standing is vital to stabilizing our climate. Oregon can lead the way with our world class forests, creating forestry jobs that enhance the forests' natural abilities to cool the climate...jobs that will last for generations to come. That is why I am am in this fight and why I am not taking any money from the fossil fuel industry or big timber corporations, and why I need your help to win this campaign. | We are just two days away from the fundraising deadline for 2019. However much we raise, or fall short, will be seen as a sign of our strength going into 2020. And while we are asking everyday people like you to pitch in what you can, the industrial timber corporations are busy holding closed door meetings with politicians to push their agenda, at our expense. We need every supporter to send a contribution before 9 PM Oregon time on New Years Eve, so we can send a strong message that we're playing to win in 2020. $10, $25, $100 or whatever you can afford - it all matters in this grassroots campaign. Thank you! Together, we can win! Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

It’s been a busy December, friend. I head up the finance team here at Tom 2020, and we’ve been preparing our report for the Federal Election Commission that’s due at the end of the year. This report is required by law for transparency in campaign finance, but it’s also an important chance to show the public how TeamTom has grown since we started back in July — and we hope you’ll help us finish the year strong. **Donate to Tom 2020 today, and you’ll be included in our report as one of Tom’s founding donors — part of the team who made this campaign a success in 2019:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’m going to be honest: Tom doesn’t usually ask people for money. But this campaign is different — it’s powered by people who are inspired by his vision for our country. And thanks to supporters like you, we’re now really close to reaching the 225,000 donor requirement to qualify for January’s debate! I’m proud to be here with you, and I can’t wait to see how we grow together in 2020. Thank you,
Jenna Jenna Narayanan
Senior Advisor, Finance
Tom 2020
